title: Withholding calculator (TDD)
description: Tests first. Calculate combined tax liability from two incomes using cached brackets. Apply standard deduction based on filing status. Subtract total withheld-to-date from both earners. Recommend additional withholding for the higher earner. Determine remaining pay periods to spread additional withholding.

title: Project scaffolding
description: Go module init, directory structure, Makefile with build/test/lint targets, golangci-lint config, SQLite setup with migrations, configurable DB_PATH. This is the foundation — all other tasks depend on it.

title: PDF parsing (TDD)
description: Tests first. Upload endpoint for PDFs. Extract first name, gross pay, federal tax withheld, pay period dates, YTD totals. Strip ALL sensitive data (SSN, address, bank accounts). Clear errors for unparseable/image-based PDFs.

title: Data persistence (TDD)
description: Tests first. Store paystub records by person (first name) and tax year. Store filing status per year. Cache tax bracket data by year. Handle duplicate paystub uploads gracefully (same person, same pay period).

title: Tax bracket data (TDD)
description: Tests first. Fetch federal brackets + standard deductions from IRS sources, cache per year in SQLite, fallback to hardcoded 2025/2026 brackets. Support filing statuses: Single, MFJ, MFS, HoH.

title: Web UI (htmx + Go templates)
description: Upload page for paystubs. Filing status config per tax year. Dashboard with withholding recommendation. Visualizations: tax bracket explorer, withholding trend over time. Supplemental income prompt with materiality threshold.
